/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneSimulator.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneSimulator26.2.sdk -mios-simulator-version-min=15.0 -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/cjpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/cdjpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdbmp.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdgif.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdppm-8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdppm-12.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/wrapper/rdppm-16.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdswitch.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdtarga.c.o" -o cjpeg-static  libjpeg.a
